title: The Island’s Future Changes
description: On pages 16–16, this part focuses on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the island’s future changes.
scene: The scene follows the island’s future changes, keeping the focus on Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, no!! He's sending in the legendary kraken!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: No matter how strong those straw hats are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...that thing can crush them like dolls!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyahahahahahah! Let's see how you handle the master of the depths!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That guy's so strong it's criminal!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you waiting for?! Get out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I brought you all the way from the northernmost reaches for this express purpose!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can I ride you again?! You were our pet before, remember?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop that, Kraken!! You stupid squid!!!

summary: The Island’s Future Changes. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
